product_name: ManipalCigna Lifetime Health, ManipalCigna Critical Illness Add On Cover, ManipalCigna Health 360 Add On Cover, ManipalCigna Lifetime Plus
summary: Health insurance products offered by ManipalCigna Health Insurance Company Limited with optional air ambulance cover available on payment of additional premium.
coverage: Air Ambulance available as optional cover on payment of additional premium

faqs.question: What is the company name offering these insurance products?
faqs.answer: ManipalCigna Health Insurance Company Limited (Formerly known as CignaTTK Health Insurance Company Limited)

faqs.question: What is the CIN of ManipalCigna Health Insurance Company Limited?
What is the IRDAI registration number?
What is the registered office address?
faqs.answer: 401/ 402, 4th Floor, Raheja Titanium, Off Western Express Highway, Goregaon East, Mumbai – 400 063

faqs.question: Is air ambulance cover included in the base policy?
faqs.answer: No, air ambulance is available as optional cover on payment of additional premium

faqs.question: Where can I find more details on risk factors, terms and conditions?
faqs.answer: Please read the sales brochure/ sales document available on our website (Download section) before concluding a sale

faqs.question: Who owns the trade name and trade logo?
faqs.answer: Trade Name / Trade Logo belongs to MEMG International l India Private Limited and Cigna Intellectual Property Inc. and is being used by ManipalCigna Health Insurance Company Limited under license

faqs.question: Are tax benefits guaranteed?
faqs.answer: Tax benefits are subject to changes in tax laws
